sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_data (value INT, date_field DATE, nullable_field INT);
INSERT INTO test_data (value, date_field, nullable_field) VALUES (5, '2000-01-01', NULL), (10, '1980-01-01', 3), (NULL, '1990-01-01', 7);
SELECT value, to_decades(value) - (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_data t2 WHERE t2.value IS NOT NULL) AS decade_interval FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL;
SELECT t1.value, to_decades(t1.value) - t2.value AS adjusted_decade FROM test_data t1 JOIN (SELECT value FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL) t2 ON t1.nullable_field = t2.value;
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM (SELECT value, to_decades(value) AS decades FROM test_data WHERE value IS NOT NULL HAVING decades < 2) AS filtered_decades;
SELECT AVG(value) - (SELECT MAX(to_decades(nullable_field)) FROM test_data WHERE nullable_field IS NOT NULL) AS average_difference FROM test_data;
SELECT t1.value, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_data t2 WHERE t2.value - t1.value < 0) AS less_than_current FROM test_data t1 GROUP BY t1.value HAVING MAX(t1.value) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT a.value, to_decades(a.value) - b.join_value AS decade_diff FROM test_data a LEFT JOIN additional_data b ON a.value = b.join_value WHERE a.value IS NOT NULL AND (a.value - 10) IS NOT NULL;
